#[repr(C)]
pub struct MarginRequirementResult {
    pub kind: u64,
    pub price_lo: u64,
    pub price_hi: u64,
    pub notional_lo: u64,
    pub notional_hi: u64,
    pub size_lo: u64,
    pub size_hi: u64,
    pub mark_lo: u64,
    pub mark_hi: u64,

    pub margin_req: u64,
    pub margin_addl: u64,
    pub abs_notional_lo: u64,
    pub abs_notional_hi: u64,
    pub flags: u64,
}

#[repr(C)]
pub struct MarginSpec {
    pub margin_type: u64,
    pub margin_req: u64,
    pub margin_addl: u64,
}

#[repr(C)]
pub struct Position {
    pub asset_id: u64,
    pub side: u64,
    pub szi: i64,
    pub mid: [u8; 0x60],
    pub margin: MarginSpec,
    pub max_leverage_alt: u64,
    pub max_leverage: u8,
    pub tail: [u8; 0x8],
}

#[repr(C)]
pub struct OraclePx {
    pub px_lo: u64,
    pub px_hi: u64,
    pub timestamp: u64,
    pub mark: i64,
}
